message:
fix(firecracker): ensure parent VMs dataset exists before clone

zfs clone does not create parent datasets (unlike zfs create -p).
When CreateVM tried to clone to tank/stockyard/vms/<vmid>, it failed
if tank/stockyard/vms didn't exist with:
  "cannot create 'tank/stockyard/vms/<vmid>': parent does not exist"

Now we ensure the parent dataset exists before cloning.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
